site.title: Caps & Hats | ION Print & Promo
site.description: Order custom caps, ball hats & toques from your local print & promo shop. Fast turnaround, quality embroidery & branded headwear that gets noticed year-round.

hero.title: Caps & Hats
hero.imageAlt: Custom branded caps, hats, and headwear

centreText.title: Top It Off Right
centreText.description: Put your brand front & centre with headwear that gets seen! Clean logos, strong visibility & amazing local service for businesses & teams across Barrie, Muskoka & the GTA.

features.title: Ball Caps, Toques & Everyday Headwear
features.description:
Your Logo. Everywhere! Branded headwear is one of the most visible promo items you can invest in, and it gets seen all across your community & beyond.

  • Baseball caps, snapbacks & bucket hats
  • Toques, wool hats, knit hats & beanies
  • Trucker hats & fitted styles
  • Sun hats

Choose from a wide selection of embroidery & decoration options to promote your brand with style.

features.title: Work Caps, Hard Hats & Specialty Headwear
features.description:
Built for the Job! We have a great selection of durable, compliant options with branding that holds up in real working conditions.

  • Hard hats & safety headwear
  • Branded work caps
  • High-visibility options
  • Specialty hats & visors

Keep your crew visible, protected & clearly identified on every job site. Complete your order with safety apparel & job site signage.
